ogTitle: Hurstville Grove vs Huskisson: Climate Safety

heading: Hurstville Grove vs Huskisson — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Hurstville Grove, New South Wales and Huskisson, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Hurstville Grove has a lower overall climate risk score (40/100) compared to Huskisson (42/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Hurstville Grove or Huskisson safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Hurstville Grove has a flood risk score of 22/100, while Huskisson scores 38/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Hurstville Grove scores 37/100 for bushfire risk. Huskisson scores 59/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Hurstville Grove or Huskisson?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Hurstville Grove has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.73% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
